Kaine 🪷 12/07/2025 03:07
now before i start this message i will preface by saying that most of this is what the song is gonna be like but its a little bit gonna be my imagination and might be different in the final one, that being said this is just to give you a vision and help you make the song so it wont matter (it wont affect structure and stuff like that, just visuals are stuff that im kind of making up here lol.) Also, there are gonna be a lot of stuff described that i dont have visuals for, so you can use your imagination there too, but ill do my best • Intro dialogue video as attached above • Piano Intro black void with marvin in the dark, jimmy isnt visible yet and its just marvin singing alone • Puppet Sprites after the piano intro and the buildup to the chorus starts, the puppet section plays out • Normal second phase, features the chorus, bridge follows after. the cartoon section will come next, but since this is the posterchild phase, try to make it as long as possible without making it feel stretched out so it gets as much screentime as possible. Remember that we have to fit all of these events in the song, so the structure is very important, although it is okay for the song to be very long, so dont be afraid to spend time in each section, dont rush though it • Cartoon Phase (like flashback) the same as the cartoon section in the irida upload on youtube. features the sml animated sprites • Spooky Cartoon Phase, cartoon phase but fucked up and evil (background exists but i cant find it, do you have it? @I’m Mr Vile Piece Of Shit )
03:07
part 1. sending part 2 soon (message was too long
Kaine 🪷 12/07/2025 03:14
from this point onwards will start to lack visuals cuz we dont have them yet • second phase with hop hop bunny playing piano and raining dead marvin bodies the hop hop bunny gods (who are the ones who gave jeffy his evil powers) are seen playing a piano which marvin and jeffy are standing on as dark jimmy and marvin sing again. while this is happening, a bunch of dead marvin bodies rain from the sky • Jimmy kicks Marvin off piano, as described above. you are led to believe marvin falls to his death. • sml question ending like every other song after marvin falls, the screen will just go black. again, this is a fakeout death. after a short period of time, the sml question would pop up (this happens after every song you beat) • ending was a fakeout after some audio distortion in the typical sml outro music, the song starts up again as you see marvin fall into frame, he sings for abit for a short buildup to the lyrics cutscene, jeffy rises up from the background, to which it happens (it will sound like the obscura lyrics cutscene) • breakdown after the lyrics section, a breakdown section will then occur • ending, real sml question after the breakdown sectino ends, the song will end again but for real this time. (you dont need to add the sml question music, it will be programmed in the build) (edited)

on break 22/07/2025 22:01
intro dialogue - just evil noise ambience with evil dark jimmy talking, maybe underlayed sml clips in the bg with empty living room ambience puppets - something like Passing Through by Kaden MacKay or a sadder/emptier and slower Mr. Blue Sky, just enough for a good "fakeout" transition to actual sprites - the static of either a tv or a radio, with the earlier instrumental just crumbling apart in a smooth enough way actual sprites - evil aura edm, i was thinking something like Watchful from Ourple Guy would fit pretty good for this bit sml animated - kevin macleod esque music, goofy a bit but not too much actual sprites (eviler) - something like Pray for Me by The Weeknd maybe with still kevin macleod in the bg lyrics bit - kung fu panda 4, song baby one more time, the 2:24 timestamp abrupt ending - just a collapsing theater sfx as the song ends

Kaine 🪷
now before i start this message i will preface by saying that most of this is what the song is gonna be like but its a little bit gonna be my imagination and might be different in the final one, that being said this is just to give you a vision and help you make the song so it wont matter (it wont affect structure and stuff like that, just visuals are stuff that im kind of making up here lol.) Also, there are gonna be a lot of stuff described that i dont have visuals for, so you can use your imagination there too, but ill do my best • Intro dialogue video as attached above • Piano Intro black void with marvin in the dark, jimmy isnt visible yet and its just marvin singing alone • Puppet Sprites after the piano intro and the buildup to the chorus starts, the puppet section plays out • Normal second phase, features the chorus, bridge follows after. the cartoon section will come next, but since this is the posterchild phase, try to make it as long as possible without making it feel stretched out so it gets as much screentime as possible. Remember that we have to fit all of these events in the song, so the structure is very important, although it is okay for the song to be very long, so dont be afraid to spend time in each section, dont rush though it • Cartoon Phase (like flashback) the same as the cartoon section in the irida upload on youtube. features the sml animated sprites • Spooky Cartoon Phase, cartoon phase but fucked up and evil (background exists but i cant find it, do you have it? @I’m Mr Vile Piece Of Shit )

Kaine 🪷
now before i start this message i will preface by saying that most of this is what the song is gonna be like but its a little bit gonna be my imagination and might be different in the final one, that being said this is just to give you a vision and help you make the song so it wont matter (it wont affect structure and stuff like that, just visuals are stuff that im kind of making up here lol.) Also, there are gonna be a lot of stuff described that i dont have visuals for, so you can use your imagination there too, but ill do my best • Intro dialogue video as attached above • Piano Intro black void with marvin in the dark, jimmy isnt visible yet and its just marvin singing alone • Puppet Sprites after the piano intro and the buildup to the chorus starts, the puppet section plays out • Normal second phase, features the chorus, bridge follows after. the cartoon section will come next, but since this is the posterchild phase, try to make it as long as possible without making it feel stretched out so it gets as much screentime as possible. Remember that we have to fit all of these events in the song, so the structure is very important, although it is okay for the song to be very long, so dont be afraid to spend time in each section, dont rush though it • Cartoon Phase (like flashback) the same as the cartoon section in the irida upload on youtube. features the sml animated sprites • Spooky Cartoon Phase, cartoon phase but fucked up and evil (background exists but i cant find it, do you have it? @I’m Mr Vile Piece Of Shit )

now before i start this message i will preface by saying that most of this is what the song is gonna be like but its a little bit gonna be my imagination and might be different in the final one, that being said this is just to give you a vision and help you make the song so it wont matter (it wont affect structure and stuff like that, just visuals are stuff that im kind of making up here lol.) Also, there are gonna be a lot of stuff described that i dont have visuals for, so you can use your imagination there too, but ill do my best • Intro dialogue video as attached above • Piano Intro black void with marvin in the dark, jimmy isnt visible yet and its just marvin singing alone • Puppet Sprites after the piano intro and the buildup to the chorus starts, the puppet section plays out • Normal second phase, features the chorus, bridge follows after. the cartoon section will come next, but since this is the posterchild phase, try to make it as long as possible without making it feel stretched out so it gets as much screentime as possible. Remember that we have to fit all of these events in the song, so the structure is very important, although it is okay for the song to be very long, so dont be afraid to spend time in each section, dont rush though it • Cartoon Phase (like flashback) the same as the cartoon section in the irida upload on youtube. features the sml animated sprites • Spooky Cartoon Phase, cartoon phase but fucked up and evil (background exists but i cant find it, do you have it? @I’m Mr Vile Piece Of Shit )

vision i had for the lyrics: I am the wound, I was the shame now you'll hear them all chant my name. You are to blame, you played the "game" so tell me, really, who's to blame? these eyes have seen, the afterlife your lies rot now, under the spotlight yet you still pretend? still play like it's fine? when you know the infinite has no line- -where it ends.... i'm not here to make amends, i'm here to tell you that everything you touch becomes a mess that everyone you talk to becomes someone else ...how can you not see...? (pause with tense instrumental, jimmy kicks marvin off stage) (voice cracks, breaking down) i—I—I begged you. God, I needed you. but I’m still here. and now you’ll know, daddy. that actions have consequences, whether you like it or not. ...i can't believe you've gone this far just being the brainless jerk you are, ...lemme ask you this. (intense rise up) (silence) "...are you fucking high?"

Kaine 🪷
now before i start this message i will preface by saying that most of this is what the song is gonna be like but its a little bit gonna be my imagination and might be different in the final one, that being said this is just to give you a vision and help you make the song so it wont matter (it wont affect structure and stuff like that, just visuals are stuff that im kind of making up here lol.) Also, there are gonna be a lot of stuff described that i dont have visuals for, so you can use your imagination there too, but ill do my best • Intro dialogue video as attached above • Piano Intro black void with marvin in the dark, jimmy isnt visible yet and its just marvin singing alone • Puppet Sprites after the piano intro and the buildup to the chorus starts, the puppet section plays out • Normal second phase, features the chorus, bridge follows after. the cartoon section will come next, but since this is the posterchild phase, try to make it as long as possible without making it feel stretched out so it gets as much screentime as possible. Remember that we have to fit all of these events in the song, so the structure is very important, although it is okay for the song to be very long, so dont be afraid to spend time in each section, dont rush though it • Cartoon Phase (like flashback) the same as the cartoon section in the irida upload on youtube. features the sml animated sprites • Spooky Cartoon Phase, cartoon phase but fucked up and evil (background exists but i cant find it, do you have it? @I’m Mr Vile Piece Of Shit )
